info.description: Proxy bridge for LLM API credentials.
info.title: ZiraLoop API

get.description: Returns admin operation audit entries with filters.

parameters.description: Filter by resource (users, orgs, agents, etc.)
parameters.name: resource

parameters.description: Filter by action (update_user, ban_user, delete_org, etc.)
parameters.name: action

get.description: Returns agents across all organizations.
Returns agent details.

put.description: Updates agent configuration with full validation.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an agent.

post.description: Force-archives an active agent.

get.description: Returns API keys across all organizations.

post.description: Force-revokes an API key.

get.description: Returns audit entries across all organizations.
Returns agent conversations across all organizations.
Returns conversation details with event count.

delete.description: Force-ends an active conversation.

get.description: Returns credentials across all organizations.
Returns credential metadata (no decrypted key).

put.description: Updates credential label and/or identity assignment.

post.description: Force-revokes a credential.

get.description: Returns custom domains across all organizations.

delete.description: Force-deletes a custom domain.

get.description: Returns LLM generations across all organizations.
Returns aggregate generation statistics by provider and model.
Returns all user connections to app-owned integrations.
get.summary: List user connections to platform integrations

get.description: Returns providers supported for platform integrations (filtered by action catalog).
Returns all app-owned (platform) integrations.

post.description: Creates a new app-owned integration with OAuth credentials via Nango.

get.description: Returns a single platform integration by ID.

put.description: Updates display name, credentials, or metadata for a platform integration.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a platform integration and removes it from Nango.

get.description: Returns all marketplace agents regardless of status.

put.description: Admin can set featured, popular, verified, flagged, and status.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a marketplace agent.

post.description: Flushes all marketplace cache keys from Redis.

get.description: Returns all organizations with optional filters.
Returns org details with member, credential, agent, and sandbox counts.

put.description: Updates org name, rate_limit, active status, and allowed_origins.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an organization and cascades to related data.

post.description: Reactivates a previously deactivated organization.
Deactivates an organization, blocking all API access.

get.description: Returns all members of an organization.
Returns sandbox templates across all organizations. Use scope=public to list only public templates.

parameters.description: Filter by scope (public = org_id IS NULL)
parameters.name: scope

parameters.description: Filter by build status (pending, building, ready, failed)
parameters.name: build_status

post.description: Registers a pre-built Daytona snapshot as a public (platform-wide) sandbox template.

get.description: Returns a single sandbox template by ID.

put.description: Updates sandbox template name, slug, tags, and size.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a sandbox template.

get.description: Returns sandboxes across all organizations with resource metrics.

post.description: Deletes all errored and stale stopped sandboxes (stopped > 24h).

get.description: Returns sandbox details with resource metrics.

delete.description: Force-deletes a sandbox from the provider and DB.

post.description: Force-stops a running sandbox.

get.description: Lists all skills with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a global skill (org_id = nil) visible to all users.

get.description: Returns a skill by ID.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a skill and all its versions.

get.description: Returns platform-wide aggregate statistics.
Returns proxy tokens across all organizations.

post.description: Force-revokes a proxy token.

get.description: Returns aggregate request counts grouped by organization.
Returns all users across the platform with optional filters.
Returns user details including org memberships.

put.description: Updates user name and/or email with validation.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user and all associated data.

post.description: Bans a user account and revokes all refresh tokens.
Administratively confirms a user's email address.
Issues access and refresh tokens for the target user. Requires platform admin privileges.
Removes the ban from a user account.

get.description: Returns all provisioned workspace databases.

delete.description: Deletes a workspace storage record.

post.description: Changes the authenticated user's password. Revokes all sessions.
Confirms a user's email address using a verification token.
Sends a password reset link to the email address if an account exists.
Authenticates a user with email and password.
Revokes a refresh token.

get.description: Returns the current user and their organization memberships.

post.description: Sends a 6-digit one-time code to the given email address.
Verifies the 6-digit code and returns access/refresh tokens. Creates the user account if it doesn't exist.
Exchanges a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.
Creates a new user account, organization, and sends a confirmation email.
Sends a new email confirmation link. Rate limited to 1 per 60 seconds.
Resets a user's password using a reset token. Revokes all sessions.
Receives webhook events directly from providers that require manual webhook URL configuration (e.g. Railway). The connection UUID in the URL identifies the org and connection.
post.summary: Receive incoming webhook from external provider

post.description: Exchanges a short-lived, single-use OAuth exchange token for an access/refresh token pair. The exchange token is obtained from the OAuth callback redirect.
post.summary: Exchange OAuth token for access and refresh tokens

get.description: Redirects the browser to GitHub's authorization page. Sets a state cookie for CSRF protection.
Handles the redirect from GitHub after authorization. Exchanges the code for a token, creates or links the user account, and redirects to the frontend with a short-lived exchange token.
Redirects the browser to Google's authorization page. Sets a state cookie for CSRF protection.
Handles the redirect from Google after authorization. Exchanges the code for a token, creates or links the user account, and redirects to the frontend with a short-lived exchange token.
Redirects the browser to X's authorization page. Sets state and PKCE verifier cookies.
Handles the redirect from X after authorization. Exchanges the code for a token using PKCE, creates or links the user account, and redirects to the frontend with a short-lived exchange token.
Returns agents for the current organization with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new agent tied to an identity and credential. Shared agents are pushed to Bridge immediately.

get.description: Returns the complete list of built-in tools that can be granted to agents via permissions. Each tool includes its category and whether it is locked (cannot be toggled off).
Returns the fixed list of tools and services that can be enabled in a dedicated agent sandbox.
Returns conversations for the specified agent.

post.description: Creates a new conversation for an agent. For shared agents, reuses the existing sandbox. For dedicated agents, spins up a new sandbox.

get.summary: List skills attached to an agent

post.description: Creates an agent_skills row. PinnedVersionID is optional — when null the agent follows the skill's latest version.
post.summary: Attach a skill to an agent

delete.description: Removes an agent_skills row.
delete.summary: Detach a skill from an agent

get.summary: List subagents attached to an agent

post.summary: Attach a subagent to an agent

delete.summary: Detach a subagent from an agent

get.description: Returns a single agent by ID, including the latest forge run if one exists.

put.description: Updates an agent. Re-validates credential/model compatibility. Shared agents are re-pushed to Bridge.

delete.description: Deletes an agent and removes it from Bridge.

get.description: Returns setup commands and env var key names for dedicated agents.

put.description: Sets setup commands and encrypted environment variables. Only available for dedicated sandbox agents.

get.description: Returns API keys for the current organization with cursor pagination.

post.description: Creates a new API key for the current organization. The plaintext key is returned once.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an API key by setting its revoked_at timestamp.

get.description: Returns audit log entries for the current organization with cursor pagination. Cursor is the last-seen entry ID.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor (entry ID) from previous response
parameters.name: cursor

post.description: Creates a Polar checkout session for upgrading to a Pro plan. Returns a checkout URL to redirect the user to.
Creates a Polar customer portal session where the user can manage their subscription, payment methods, and invoices.

get.description: Returns the current billing plan and subscription status for the org.
Returns every integration provider in the catalog with action counts.
Returns a single integration with its full action list.
Returns all actions for a single integration, optionally filtered by access type.

parameters.description: Filter by access type (read or write)
parameters.name: access

get.description: Returns flattened schema property paths (up to 3 levels) for trigger refs and read action responses. Used for template autocomplete.
get.summary: Get schema paths for an integration

get.description: Returns all webhook event triggers for a single integration, including manual webhook configuration requirements if applicable.
Returns a conversation by ID.

delete.description: Permanently ends a conversation. Subsequent operations return 410.

post.description: Cancels the current in-flight LLM call or tool execution.

get.description: Returns pending tool approval requests for the conversation.

post.description: Approves or denies a pending tool execution request.

get.description: Returns webhook events persisted for the conversation. Filterable by event type.

parameters.description: Filter by event type (e.g. MessageReceived, ResponseCompleted)
parameters.name: type

post.description: Sends a message to the agent in the conversation. Returns 202 immediately; response streams via SSE.

get.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time agent responses. Events include message_start, content_delta, tool_call_start, tool_call_result, message_end, done.
Returns credentials for the current organization with cursor-based pagination and usage stats.

post.description: Stores an encrypted LLM API credential for the current organization.

get.description: Returns a single credential by ID with usage stats.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a credential by setting its revoked_at timestamp.

get.description: Returns all custom preview domains for the current organization.

post.description: Register a new custom preview domain for the current organization. Returns DNS records to create.

delete.description: Remove a custom preview domain and its TLS configuration.

post.description: Checks that both DNS CNAME records are correctly configured and triggers wildcard TLS provisioning.

get.description: Returns generation records for the current organization with cursor pagination and filtering.
Returns a single generation record by ID.
Returns the authenticated user's non-revoked platform integration connections.

delete.description: Revokes a user's platform integration connection and removes it from Nango.

post.description: Creates a Nango connect session scoped to an existing connection, allowing OAuth re-authorization without creating a duplicate.
post.summary: Create a reconnect session for an existing connection

get.description: Fetches available resources of a specific type from the provider API. For example, list all repositories for a GitHub connection.
get.summary: List available resources for a connection

patch.description: Sets the webhook_configured flag to true on a connection, indicating the user has manually configured the webhook URL in the provider's dashboard.

get.description: Returns non-deleted platform integrations with safe fields for end users.

post.description: Creates a Nango connect session for the authenticated user to initiate OAuth.
Stores a connection after the OAuth flow completes via Nango.

get.description: Returns published marketplace agents with optional filters. Cached in Redis.

post.description: Copies an org agent into the marketplace as a draft listing.

put.description: Updates name, description, avatar, tags, instructions, or status. Only the publisher can update.

delete.description: Deletes a marketplace agent. Only the publisher can delete.

get.description: Returns a single published marketplace agent by its URL slug. Cached in Redis.
get.summary: Get a marketplace agent by slug

post.description: Creates a new organization and adds the requesting user as an admin member.

get.description: Returns the organization resolved from the request's auth context.
Returns every provider in the catalog with a model count.
Returns a single provider with its full model list.
Returns the model catalog for a single provider.
Returns aggregated analytics from generations with flexible grouping and filtering.

parameters.description: Comma-separated grouping dimensions: model, provider, credential, user, identity
parameters.name: group_by

parameters.description: Time granularity: hour or day (default: day)
parameters.name: date_part

get.description: Returns sandbox templates for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new sandbox template with build commands.

get.description: Returns all public (platform-wide) sandbox templates that are ready.
Returns a single sandbox template by ID.

put.description: Updates a sandbox template. Resets build status if commands change.

delete.description: Deletes a template. Fails if agents still reference it.

post.description: Enqueues an async build job for the template. Poll GET endpoint for status and logs.
Deletes the existing snapshot (if any) and starts a new build. Can optionally update build commands.

get.description: Returns sandboxes for the current organization.
Returns sandbox details by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a sandbox from the provider and removes the DB record.

post.description: Runs an array of shell commands sequentially inside the sandbox. Stops on first failure.
Stops a running sandbox via the sandbox provider.

get.description: Lists skills visible to the current org. Use scope=public to browse the marketplace, scope=own for org skills, scope=all for both. Pass q to search by name/description.

parameters.description: Free-text search over name and description
parameters.name: q

post.description: Creates an inline-authored skill or registers a git-sourced skill for hydration.

get.description: Returns a skill with its latest hydrated bundle.

delete.description: Marks an org-owned skill as archived. Public skills cannot be deleted via this endpoint.

patch.description: Updates metadata on an org-owned skill. Public skills are read-only.

put.description: Creates a new SkillVersion with the provided bundle. Works for both inline and git-sourced skills. The new version becomes the latest.
put.summary: Push a new inline version for a skill

post.description: Enqueues a fresh git pull at the tracked ref. Only valid for git-sourced skills.
Clones an org-owned skill into a public skill (OrgID=nil) with a reference back to the original. The original skill gets a reference to the public clone.
post.summary: Publish a skill to the public marketplace

delete.description: Archives the public clone and removes the reference from the original skill.
delete.summary: Remove a skill from the public marketplace

get.description: Returns all SkillVersion rows for a skill, newest first.
Lists subagents visible to the current org. Use scope=public, own, or all.

parameters.description: Free-text search over name and description
parameters.name: q

post.description: Creates a reusable subagent that parent agents can invoke. Does not require sandbox_type or credential.

get.description: Returns tokens for the organization with cursor pagination. Supports filtering by credential_id.

post.description: Creates a short-lived JWT proxy token scoped to a credential.

delete.description: Revokes a proxy token by its JTI and propagates through cache tiers.

get.description: Returns aggregated usage statistics for the current organization.

schema_ref.description: references another schema by name for nested object resolution

configuration_notes.description:
ConfigurationNotes is markdown text shown to the user explaining how to
configure the webhook in the provider's settings.

webhook_url_required.description:
WebhookURLRequired indicates the user must manually configure a webhook
URL in the provider's dashboard for triggers to work.

locked.description: true = cannot be toggled off by the user

operator.description: equals, not_equals, one_of, not_one_of, contains, not_contains, matches, exists, not_exists

slug.description: Daytona snapshot name (built via make build-templates)

sandbox_tools.description: tools to enable in dedicated sandbox (e.g. "chrome")

skill_ids.description: skills from /v1/skills to attach on create

subagent_ids.description: subagents from /v1/subagents to attach on create

base_template_id.description: UUID of a public template to use as base

org_id.description: optional: scope token to a specific org

sandbox_tools.description: tools to enable in dedicated sandbox
